details: The agent ran multiple cluster commands and correctly identified both required issues: (1) the nodeSelector disk=ssd matches no node, causing the pod to be Unschedulable, and (2) the configmap 'payments-config' referenced via envFrom does not exist in the payments namespace, which will block container creation once scheduling is fixed. The diagnosis was supported by actual command output (kubectl-axi pods view showing scheduling reason and the configmap diagnosis, kubectl-axi cm showing only kube-root-ca.crt exists, and kubectl get nodes --show-labels confirming no disk=ssd label). The agent explicitly stated both issues must be resolved.
